env_files.role: Raw order-level and distractor rows with gross revenue, discounts, refunds, statuses, dates, categories, and cities
env_files.reproducibility_note: Regenerated for harder data_insight_001 case to remove summary answers and require filtering/calculation.

env_files.role: Metric rules defining net revenue, valid rows, and excluded row types
Mapping from cities to company reporting regions
Natural-language manager requirements with useful constraints and irrelevant planning context
Non-canonical forecast, draft summary, old-year, unit, and subtotal distractors

source_policy.web_usage_note: Follow web_policy. Closed-env cases should be solved from cached env files only.

notes: This case intentionally exposes raw rows plus distractors only. Correct results must be computed from completed 2025 transaction rows using net revenue and city-to-reporting-region mapping.
